_doc: Pinned versions of external skills the framework depends on. /setup hashes the installed SKILL.md content and warns on drift from `skill_md_sha256`. First-run /setup populates `skill_md_sha256` if it is empty.

huashu-design.license_summary: Personal/research use is free and unrestricted. Commercial / client / enterprise use requires authorization from the author (huasheng / 花叔). The framework dispatches huashu-design from /execute Step 2.5; first dispatch per repo writes .design-system/.huashu-license-ack to record acknowledgement.
huashu-design.drift_policy: /setup hashes SKILL.md and compares to skill_md_sha256. On mismatch, warn the operator: the brand-spec.md schema may have changed; re-run /brand-extract and confirm output still matches the schema_contract above before relying on downstream design work.
